metadata.seed: Okay, so I've had an issue that started about when I was a little bit younger. When I was about ten years old, I was really active. I was playing outside all the time. And my neighbors had large dogs that were always in their yard. They would always be outside running around, and we were separated by a fence. And if I was playing outside or like kicking a ball around or doing anything with a friend, and I had to go after the ball, it would be near the fence. And especially if I wasn't looking, I would be leaning down to grab the ball or just have my back turned. And they would come up, they would be really excited, and they would jump on the fence, and I never would be expecting it, and they would always startle me, and I would always feel this sense of fear and uneasiness around them. And so I've kind of always been a little bit more uncomfortable around dogs since all of that happened.

patient.query: Okay, so I've had an issue that started about when I was a little bit younger. When I was about ten years old, I was really active. I was playing outside all the time. And if I was playing outside or like kicking a ball around or doing anything with a friend, and I had to go after the ball, it would be near the fence. And especially if I wasn't looking, I would be leaning down to grab the ball or just have my back turned. And they would come up, they would be really excited, and they would jump on the fence, and I never would be expecting it, and they would always startle me, and I would always feel this sense of fear and uneasiness around them. And so I've kind of always been a little bit more uncomfortable around dogs since all of that happened.

alternative_perspective.response: It sounds like that experience definitely created some fear for you. Have you ever thought about what a really trusted friend might notice or think about how you feel around dogs?

safety_check.response: I hear you—those memories of being startled by the dogs must have been really unsettling, especially when you were focused on playing with friends. It's completely understandable how that could have shaped your feelings about dogs over time.
